CESL/06/2026-27/PM-eBus Sewa3/262704003.display_title: Selection of Bus Operator for 3,604 Electric Buses under PM-eBus Sewa (Tender 3)
CESL/06/2026-27/PM-eBus Sewa3/262704003.why_it_matters: One of the largest active e-bus tenders in India. GCC model means operator funds buses + infra; risk on ops quality and utilisation. Significant revenue visibility for winning OEM.
CESL/06/2026-27/PM-eBus Sewa3/262704003.key_risks: Multi-city coordination risk; depot allocation by STUs; grid availability for high-capacity charging.
CESL/06/2026-27/PM-eBus Sewa3/262704003.eligibility_summary: Bus operators with experience in GCC-model electric bus operations. Qualification criteria specified in RFQ document.

CESL/06/2025-26/PM E-Drive/252601015.display_title: Selection of Bus Operator for 6,230 Electric Buses under PM E-DRIVE Scheme (Tender II)
CESL/06/2025-26/PM E-Drive/252601015.why_it_matters: One consolidated tender for 6,230 electric buses (2,900 under PM E-DRIVE Tender-II plus 3,330 for Delhi). Bids opened 23 February 2026 and submission closed 10 March 2026; the tender is currently under bid evaluation, with multiple operators having bid across all five packages. No award confirmed. An award would be a major OEM order.
CESL/06/2025-26/PM E-Drive/252601015.key_risks: Under bid evaluation — no award confirmed and the evaluation timeline is not published. Large Delhi component (3,330 buses) adds political/regulatory complexity.
CESL/06/2025-26/PM E-Drive/252601015.eligibility_summary: Bus operators with GCC experience. Delhi portion (3,330 buses) is part of the same consolidated 6,230-bus tender.
CESL/06/2025-26/PM E-Drive/252601015.notes: Consolidated tender totalling 6,230 buses (2,900 PM E-DRIVE Tender-II + 3,330 Delhi). Bids opened 23 February 2026; submission closed 10 March 2026; currently under bid evaluation, no award confirmed. Verified against CESL portal, Sustainable Bus, and electrive.
